_meta: Provisional Chinese for UI chrome only. Yilin and the SUES ACI Lab own the canonical terminology and the locked bilingual glossary. Framework terms (the four capabilities, dæmon, Mens, Manus, Membra) are not set here and should be added from that glossary.
